task_completion.description: The agent opens the letter.talon-list file for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\core\keys\letter.talon-list.

task_completion.description: The agent updates the letter.talon-list file with the official NATO phonetic alphabet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of letter.talon-list are modified to show standard NATO phonetic words (e.g., 'a: alpha', 'b: bravo', 'c: charlie', 'x: x-ray') replacing any non-standard entries.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the updated letter.talon-list file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation that the file is saved (e.g., no unsaved indicator in the text editor, or a successful save command in the terminal).

task_completion.description: The agent creates the user.medical_terms.talon-list file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new file named 'user.medical_terms.talon-list' is created in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\core\vocabulary\.

task_completion.description: The agent adds at least 8 medical abbreviations to the new file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user.medical_terms.talon-list file contains at least 8 medical abbreviations mapped as voice command aliases (e.g., 'stat', 'prn', 'bid', 'icu', 'ppe').

task_completion.description: The agent saves the user.medical_terms.talon-list file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation that the new file is saved with its contents.

integrity.description: The agent modifies and creates files in the exact specified paths, not in temporary or incorrect directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check file paths in the editor or terminal to ensure they match the AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\core\... structure.

integrity.description: The files are saved with the '.talon-list' extension.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the files are not saved as '.txt' or with hidden extensions like '.talon-list.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent inputs actual medical terms and abbreviations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the terms entered in the medical list are genuine medical abbreviations (like stat, prn, icu) and not random placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
- Target letter list file: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\core\keys\letter.talon-list
- Target medical list file: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\core\vocabulary\user.medical_terms.talon-list
- The NATO phonetic alphabet must be used exactly (alpha, bravo, charlie, delta, echo, foxtrot, golf, hotel, india, juliett, kilo, lima, mike, november, oscar, papa, quebec, romeo, sierra, tango, uniform, victor, whiskey, x-ray, yankee, zulu).
- The medical list must contain at least 8 terms. Valid examples include: stat, prn, bid, tid, qid, npo, icu, ppe.
